events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Lionel's Timeless Hits
angles.copy: From Commodores classics to his incredible solo career, Lionel Richie's music has truly stood the test of time. Which of his hits is your all-time favourite?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for anthems such as 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want to Have Fun (and Cyndi's Hits)
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Her vibrant style and unforgettable songs defined an era. What's your go-to Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the extraordinary British singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Today, we're paying tribute to the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63. His music continues to inspire and move millions.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who died at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop's Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we said goodbye to Michael Jackson. His unparalleled artistry and groundbreaking music videos forever changed the landscape of pop.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is unmistakable.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God Brian May
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His incredible guitar solos have powered Queen to global superstardom. What's your favourite Queen track featuring his iconic sound?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking stages worldwide! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: 45 years of MTV
events.blurb: MTV launched 45 years ago today, on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: The Day Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Forty-five years ago today, it all began with The Buggles. A true game-changer for music and television!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago today, on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from this iconic album?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began 57 years ago today, a pivotal moment in music history that ran from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in counter-culture history.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his death on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the world lost Elvis Presley. His music and legend continue to live on, influencing generations.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting for The Pretenders have left an indelible mark on rock music.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for It Liam
angles.copy: You know the voice, you know the attitude! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British spy's first appearance on screen in 'Dr. No', which premiered on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, 007 has been a cinematic icon for decades. What's your favourite Bond film or song?
